name: Binance
philosophy: A confident financial-platform interface anchored on a deep near-black canvas, where Binance's iconic yellow (#FCD535) carries every primary CTA, brand accent, and value-claim moment.
trademark_signals: Single accent color: (#FCD535) does all brand voltage
Custom type stack: BinanceNova (display + body) and BinancePlex (numbers
Multi-theme: marketing pages default dark ; transactional pages flip light. Yellow CTAs and trading green/red are shared across both
Light footer on dark body: the homepage uses (#fafafa) for the footer even when the body above it is dark — a deliberate inversion that visually closes the page
Trading semantics: green up / red down ( / ) for price changes, applied as text color rather than badge background
ai_slop_avoided: introduce a second brand color. The system has exactly one accent  and any expansion dilutes the brand identity. The turquoise on Smart Money is a single-product experiment, not a system token
use yellow for body text or large surface fills. It is for focal-point CTAs and headlines only
use / as background fills on cards. They are price-direction signals, expressed as text color or small badge fill
